description: Implement apcore Module trait for CLI subprocess execution. CliModule wraps ScannedModule with async subprocess execution via tokio spawn_blocking.

tasks.title: Create module skeleton and executor functions
tasks.description: Create src/module/ with mod.rs, executor.rs (build_arguments, validate_no_injection, execute_subprocess), cli_module.rs.

tasks.title: Implement CliModule with Module trait
tasks.description: Implement CliModule::new, from_scanned, and the Module trait (execute, input_schema, output_schema, description).

tasks.title: Tests and quality gates
tasks.description: Write ~20 tests covering arg building, injection prevention, subprocess execution, and CliModule trait methods.
